news_items.title: Google completes $32 billion Wiz acquisition to boost cloud security
news_items.summary: Google has finalized its $32 billion acquisition of cloud security firm Wiz, integrating its AI-powered cybersecurity platform with Google Cloud's Threat Intelligence and Security Operations to enhance threat detection and response.

news_items.title: SpaceX's Starship delays risk NASA moon landing timeline
news_items.summary: SpaceX's Starship delays have raised concerns about NASA's moon landing timeline, according to watchdog reports.

news_items.title: MSI upgrades 32-inch 4K OLED monitor with Samsung's Tandem OLED technology
news_items.summary: MSI has updated its 32-inch 4K OLED monitor with Samsung's latest Tandem OLED panel technology, offering improved display quality and VESA DisplayHDR True Black 500 certification.

news_items.title: Meta acquires AI agent social network Moltbook
news_items.summary: Meta has acquired AI agent social network Moltbook and is advancing its age-checking technology amid growing online safety regulations.

news_items.title: Intel announces new Core Ultra processors starting at $199
news_items.summary: Intel announces $299 Core Ultra 7 270K Plus and $199 Core Ultra 5 250K Plus CPUs with enhanced performance capabilities.

news_items.title: Scanner raises $22 million for AI-powered threat hunting
news_items.summary: San Francisco-based Scanner helps organizations build cloud-native security data lakes with AI agents for interactive investigations and autonomous response.

news_items.title: Arko launches redesigned loyalty app with enhanced features
news_items.summary: Convenience-store chain Arko introduces a new interface for rewards, fuel discounts, offers and games, built to scale across its multi-brand footprint.

news_items.title: ARBOR Technology showcases edge AI at Japan IT Week 2026
news_items.summary: ARBOR Technology presents its latest breakthroughs in mobile computing and edge automation under the theme 'Reliable Edge AI: The Core of Next-Gen Manufacturing'.

news_items.title: NAPLAN tests disrupted by tech issues on first day
news_items.summary: Technical issues disrupted NAPLAN testing on the first day, highlighting ongoing challenges in educational technology infrastructure.

news_items.title: Amazon Go's rise and fall shaping future of convenience retail
news_items.summary: With Amazon Go stores closing, urban convenience store formats and automation are expected to shape the future of retail innovation.
